message: feat: build-time changelog.json from git, no runtime git access in WebViewer
test: replace hard-coded v0.1.0 check with semver >= baseline assertion
feat: info popup overlay in emblem with version and chronicles history
feat: show occupied workers in pop stat, remove free slots display, fix flux fallback
feat: rename Focus to Flux, collapsible emblem, stats bar, remove brittle version test
docs: update CardArt README for current pipeline (no baked text, WebP export, all prompts)
feat: rename game to Ironhold — Wars of the Realm
feat: card art pipeline, game assets, and fantasy-themed web viewer
docs: add CardArt generation guide
feat: card frame template + compose pipeline
fix: name outputs as {promptname}-{datetime}-{version}
feat: add CardArt image generation script
chore: gitignore api.token
feat: add delete_game MCP command
fix: show population as X/maxCap format everywhere
feat: settlement population capacity (10-40 rolled at creation, caps total People)
fix: remove duplicate People/Population display in WebViewer
feat: WebViewer shows population/occupation and worker assignments
feat: round-robin worker distribution with scaled production
feat: worker occupation system — people are occupied not consumed
feat: add WebViewer — read-only live game viewer on port 5050
feat: add Wasteland land card (30% of deck, unbuildable)
feat: hand limit (7), discard pile, 500-card land deck with 15/round burn, locked board cells with adjacency expansion
feat: add per-card Fertility and AccessibilityCost rolled stats to LandCard
feat: add Wood resource, Lumber Camp, Fishing Camp, Sheep Pasture buildings; Farm costs 10 Wood to place
fix: register IGameRepository in DI; add README and rebuild script
chore: add VS Code MCP server config for strategy-game
test: assert known commit message appears in get_version history output
feat: add get_version MCP tool with git tag, commit hash, dirty status, and recent commits
test: add unit and integration tests for GameService and MCP tools (48 tests)
feat: upgrade StrategyGame to .NET 10
docs: add temporary workspace commit/push work instructions
Merge pull request #1 from AJosephsen/claude/strategy-game-mcp-server-EpS5C
feat: add Focus resource — the action currency for drawing and playing cards
feat: add C# strategy board game with MCP server
feat: go fully client-side with localStorage API key
chore: add .gitignore to exclude node_modules
feat: initial sprite editor with OpenAI image generation and mask editing
